title: The Team Splits Again
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on the team splits again within the The Team Divides Over Sanji storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Nekomamushi
dialogue.text: Whale Forest, Guardians Residential District

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: waah...

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: Whoa! Garchu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Oi, every- one! It's the straw hat pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Looks like they're going at it here, too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Chopper's here, every- one!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: When you look at it from up close, the whale tree sure is huge!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Is it just me or do these think guys heal up super fast?

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: Garchuui!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's not just you.

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy! It's US! Sorry about earlier!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We just don't tolerate intruders in the slightest!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Ah! You guys! Don't worry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Where's nekomamushi !?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Thank you for coming, Savior...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And his friends!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Who's that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Allow me to once again express my gratitude. Thank you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Apologies for the Blunder of my men earlier.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We'd gotten a little bit oversensitive to intruders.

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: Whale Forest Guardians Captain jaguar milk Pedro in the trees

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: in the trees. Anyway, bepo and the others are waiting.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hm? Where were you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ah. Well, they can wait a bit more.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I want to see nekomamushi and the lion milk pekomamushi.

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: If you mean pekoms, you're in luck, he's awoken. He's in the building in the back.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We've been keeping this a secret from everyone else.

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Sanji's a good guy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: If there's anything we can do to help...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Luffy! I'm really worried about nekomamushi, so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'll be going ahead to check up on him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Dr. Chopper! Let me guide you!)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Oi, chopper! Why're you gettin' all stiff?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I... I'm not S- stiff, stupid!)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This way, please()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: O... OKay()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You're acting weird, man.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The master's in his bath right now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Oh... okay.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Wait! Bath!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Meow meow meow meow meow meow meow meow meow meow meow meow meow meow meooooo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Lasagne- Oooooow.. I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Is the beeeeeees? I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Oooooo 00I! Neko- Manushi!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I thought I told you baths were forbidden! Your wounds will reopen!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You're also supposed to stick to light foods! And I forbade you from using your left hand!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: GORONYANYA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yo, chopper!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Don't worry, just kick back and relax!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm a freedom-Lovin' kind'a man!

summary: The Team Splits Again: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
